services.title: Modular financial solutions for every stage of the business.
services.description: You can start with a focused dashboard or build a complete BI system with automation, a financial model, and an executive presentation.

items.title: Power BI dashboards
items.description: Executive KPIs, drill-down by product, branch, or period, clear visuals, and automated refresh.

items.title: P&L and profitability analysis
items.description: Revenue, COGS, OPEX, EBITDA, gross margin, and net income analysis with actionable recommendations.

items.title: Financial models
items.description: Three-year forecasts, pessimistic/base/optimistic scenarios, cash flow, and investor-ready structure.

items.title: Python + SQL automation
items.description: Scripts and ETL pipelines that consolidate data from ERPs, databases, or Excel/CSV files.

items.title: Executive pitch decks
items.description: Presentations for funding rounds, leadership committees, or financial communication with a clear narrative.

items.title: Automated reports
items.description: PDFs, presentations, or editable files generated with one click or on a schedule.

packages.title: Three packages to turn data into decisions.
packages.description: All include a clear scope, revisions, and delivery within the agreed timeline.

items.name: Basic
features: Power BI dashboard up to 6 KPIs

additionalServices.title: Additional services
additionalServices.description: Add focused deliverables to any package when the project needs more depth, automation, or executive material.
additionalServices.label: Optional add-ons

items.name: Investor pitch deck
items.description: A clear investment story with numbers, market context, and decision-ready slides.

items.name: Three-year forecast model
items.description: Scenario-based projections to plan revenue, costs, margins, and cash flow.

items.name: Report automation
items.description: Automated report generation from recurring data sources and operational files.

items.name: Profitability analysis
items.description: Margin and profitability review by product, channel, branch, or customer group.

contact.title: Ready to start?
contact.description: Message me on Workana and I will reply in under 24 hours with a tailored proposal.
